name: Sediment TOC and TIC Measurements from GeoB16310-3 at Gulf of Mexico Site
description: Dataset containing sediment depth, Total Organic Carbon (TOC), and Total Inorganic Carbon (TIC) measurements from a single core sample (Event: GeoB16310-3) collected at a fixed location in the Gulf of Mexico (Latitude 23.824, Longitude -87.170) on March 23, 2012.
